title: holodiscus velutinus
intro: Holodiscus velutinus, also known as the green veils or ironweed, is a flowering plant species native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Holodiscus velutinus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and treat skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Holodiscus velutinus include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to make teas, medicines, and topical creams for various health issues.
